login.title: Login to Lana
login.wifPlaceholder: Enter your WIF key or scan QR code
login.cameraError: Camera access denied. Please enable camera permissions.
login.profileNotFound: Profile not found. Please create your profile first.

assignLana8Wonder.title: Assign Lana 8 Wonder
assignLana8Wonder.description: Assign wallets to customer's annuity plan
assignLana8Wonder.warningMessage: The PDF document will be deleted after you press Create Plan. If you lose the data from the PDF file, the wallets are lost forever.

generateWalletsDialog.title: Generate Wallets - Security Notice
generateWalletsDialog.message1: You can create wallets through offlinelana.org or right here. You need to be aware that these are generated on your computer, which is online, whereas on offlinelana.org this is done when your computer is offline.
generateWalletsDialog.message2: Everything depends on your internal security posture. If you feel you need to protect yourself, use offlinelana.org, otherwise do it here and simplify your life 🙂
generateWalletsDialog.message3: The responsibility is in your hands.
generateWalletsDialog.message4: By clicking "Generate", 8 new wallets will be created and automatically filled in the form. A PDF document with all wallet information and QR codes will be generated for secure storage.

buyLana.title: Buy Lana 8 Wonder
buyLana.description: Purchase LANA through the 8 Wonder program

index.title: Lana8Wonder
index.tagline: Transform your {{currency}}88 investment into extraordinary wealth with 8-account.
index.quote: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it… He who doesn't, pays it.
index.footer: © 2024 Lana8Wonder. Investment strategies calculated using proven mathematical formulas.
index.footerDetails: Initial investment: {{currency}}88 | 8 Accounts | Linear, Compound & Passive Strategies

availableSlots.title: Available Lana8Wonder Slots for buying
availableSlots.noSlotsMessage: No slots are currently available. Join our waiting list and we'll notify you when a slot becomes available.
availableSlots.walletQuestion: Do you have a registered Lana Wallet?
availableSlots.walletDescription: To purchase Lana8Wonder, you need a Lana wallet. If you don't have one yet, we'll help you create it.
availableSlots.eachSlotRequires: Each slot requires ~{{amount}} LANA (€100 at current rate)

tradingCalculator.title: Let's see Your 8th Wonder Plan
tradingCalculator.description: Current prices loaded from Nostr Network. Select your currency and generate your personalized 8-account trading strategy.

tradingCalculator.accountsTitle: In current Split you can create next 8 Lana Wonder Accounts
tradingCalculator.portfolioProjectionDescription: Projected value of your remaining LANA from Account 8 at each Split milestone
tradingCalculator.portfolioFixedNote: After reaching {{amount}}, portfolio value remains fixed while remaining LANA adjusts to maintain this value as LANA price doubles with each split.
